chunks.text: Order Sheet IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT, HYDERABAD Cr. Appeal No. S- 01 of 2025 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE 24.03.2025 For orders on MA 2079/25 For orders on MA 2080/25 For orders on MA 81/25 Raja Jawad Ali Saahar, Advocate for appellant Mr. Irfan Ali Talpur, D.P.G Complainant and injured are present in person 1. Complainant, injured as well as the appellant have jointly moved this application under Section 345(v) Cr.P.C. with a prayer to accord permission to compound the matter as the parties have patched up with each other and the complainant and the injured have forgiven the appellant in the name of Almighty Allah and have also waived the fine amount for good relations in future. The permission is granted. 2. That application under Section 345(vi) Cr.P.C. has also been filed with a prayer that in view of compromise arrived at between the parties, the appellant may be acquitted from the charge. That Complainant and the injured have filed duly verified affidavits who are also present in court. In view of such affidavits and the statements made in person I am of the view that since the offence is compoundable, this compromise application is accepted and the appellant is acquitted from all the charges. He shall be released forthwith if not required in any other case. This Cr. Appeal No. 01 of 2025 stands disposed of in the above terms. JUDGE karar_hussain/PS*
